Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.TaskName -like ''*Wod*'' } | Select-Object TaskName, State, @{N=''LastRun'';E={\(Get-ScheduledTaskInfo $_.TaskName\).LastRunTime}}, @{N=''NextRun'';E={\(Get-ScheduledTaskInfo $_.TaskName\).NextRunTime}} | Format-List")
